---
title: Dr. Tsukahara Edits a Research Topic in Frontiers in Cognition
date: 2025-11-25
categories: [Team]
description: Read papers or submit your own in a Frontiers Research Topic exploring the properties of intrinsic functional brain networks and their intersection with ascending arousal systems.
image: 17917545.png
page: ""
link: "https://www.frontiersin.org/research-topics/75476/architectures-of-the-resting-brain-discrete-networks-continuous-gradients-and-their-biological-foundations"
draft: false
---

::: {style="text-align: center;"}

:::
